name: Crystalline Chronicle
description: An etched crystal sphere the size of a grapefruit hums faintly and pulses with irregular flares of inner light. While you are touching the crystal, you can retrieve and store information and spells within the crystal at the same rate as reading and writing. When found, the crystal contains the following spells: {@spell detect thoughts}, {@spell intellect fortress|TCE}, {@spell Rary's telepathic bond}, {@spell sending}, {@spell telekinesis}, {@spell Tasha's mind whip|TCE}, and {@spell Tenser's fl
